creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
This is a rewrite of the www/aolserver port, including an update to 4.5
I would like to take over maintainership, if the maintainer agrees.

All modules are now treated as separate ports.

Please see http://www.matuska.org/martin/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports for these ports
Or download them in .tar.gz format: http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/aolserverports.tar.gz

This PR supersedes ports/104353
